class.help: Tabla codificadora de Convenios, en donde se registrará para cada uno el Código, la Descripción y Observaciones referidos a las vacaciones.
class.label: Convenio
class.name: CONVENIO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_convenio as oi_convenio, t1.oi_convenio as B_oi_convenio, t1.c_convenio as B_c_convenio, t1.d_convenio as B_d_convenio, SEC.policy, t1.c_convenio as CODE, t1.d_convenio as TEXT, t0.oi_matriz_vac as oi_matriz_vac FROM VAC05_CONVENIOS as t0,ORG18_CONVENIOS as t1,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Convenios.CONVENIO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_convenio RIGHT OUTER t1.oi_convenio,t1.oi_convenio LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_convenio asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_convenio as oi_convenio, t1.oi_convenio as B_oi_convenio, SEC.policy FROM VAC05_CONVENIOS as t0,ORG18_CONVENIOS as t1,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Convenios.CONVENIO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_convenio RIGHT OUTER t1.oi_convenio,t1.oi_convenio LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_convenio asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Observaciones del Convenio. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 1000 caracteres.
attribute.label: Observaciones
attribute.name: o_convenio

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Vacaciones.Convenios.CONVENIO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Vacaciones.Convenios.CONVENIO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(VAC05_CONVENIOS.oi_convenio) as CNT from VAC05_CONVENIOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and VAC05_CONVENIOS.oi_convenio={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(VAC05_CONVENIOS.d_convenio,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(VAC05_CONVENIOS.c_convenio,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
